name: Create Water Cycle Science Lesson Flipchart
description: A 5th grade science teacher needs a 3-page flipchart lesson on the water cycle. The flipchart must include an introductory page titled 'The Water Cycle' with a subtitle naming the three main stages (Evaporation, Condensation, and Precipitation), a visual diagram page with at least three labeled shapes representing these stages, and a 'Quick Check' assessment page with at least two written questions. Login as ga / password123 and save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/water_cycle_lesson.flipchart.
